text_block_list.text:
It's Gold City's second summer camp. This time
last year, she was feeling tense, but now...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can I go straight to the beach after I leave
my stuff?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm really itching to go for a run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll be up against two insanely fast runners in the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to it. I want to become
stronger and win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just talking about it is giving me a serious urge to
run. Let's go, Trainer!

It looks like this summer camp is off to a blazing
hot start!
